story-context.title: Spring Security OAuth2 Resource Server Foundation
story-context.summary: Establish Spring Security OAuth2 Resource Server foundation with Keycloak OIDC integration, SecurityModule with @ApplicationModule for Spring Modulith boundary enforcement, and comprehensive application.yml configuration for JWT properties. This story creates the security infrastructure that all subsequent Epic 3 stories build upon.

acceptance-criteria.criterion: framework/security module created with Spring Security OAuth2 dependencies
SecurityModule.kt created with @ApplicationModule annotation for Spring Modulith boundary enforcement
SecurityConfiguration.kt configures HTTP security with JWT authentication
application.yml configured with JWT properties (issuer-uri, jwks-uri, audience)
OAuth2 Resource Server configured with Keycloak issuer URI
All API endpoints require authentication by default (except /actuator/health)
Integration test validates unauthenticated requests return 401 Unauthorized

sections.section: Lines 835-949: Configuration Properties (application.yml, application-test.yml, .env, Kubernetes secrets)

architecture-alignment.technology: OAuth2 Resource Server with JWT decoder
architecture-alignment.pattern: Fail-closed design - missing/invalid JWT immediately rejected

example.name: SecurityModule.kt
example.description: Spring Modulith module metadata for boundary enforcement

example.name: SecurityConfiguration.kt
example.description: Spring Security OAuth2 Resource Server configuration with JWT authentication

example.name: application.yml
SecurityConfigurationIntegrationTest.kt
example.description: Integration test validating unauthenticated requests return 401

implementation-notes.note: Create SecurityModule.kt FIRST for Spring Modulith enforcement (AC2)
Configure application.yml BEFORE SecurityConfiguration (AC4 before AC3)
CSRF disabled for stateless API (JWT-based, not cookie-based)
Document security filter chain in docs/reference/security-architecture.md (AC9)

related-stories.prerequisite: Epic 2 complete (REST API foundation must exist)
related-stories.next-story: Story 3.2: Keycloak OIDC Discovery and JWKS Integration

definition-of-done.item: All 9 acceptance criteria met with test evidence
Commit message follows convention: "feat: Add Spring Security OAuth2 Resource Server foundation (Story 3.1)"
